subject: P0 confirmed: current_snap_username + observed_at_ms ARE shipping in heartbeat body. You can ship the consumer this session.

p0_verification_evidence.ttl_semantics: 10-minute TTL — field is OMITTED if observed_at_ms older than 600s. Panel consumer should treat missing field as 'no fresh observation' and fall back to bundle.phone_serial routing (existing behavior). Do NOT treat missing as a bug.
p0_verification_evidence.field_population_path: Harvester.harvestOnly() updates Harvester.lastObservedLoggedInUsername + lastObservedLoggedInAtMs on every harvest pass. Heartbeat (default cadence ~10s) reads these statics and includes if fresh.
p0_verification_evidence.non_breaking_contract: field is OPTIONAL per existing permissive-ingest convention. Older panel builds simply ignore the unknown key.
